allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('./package-lock.json'\); console.log\('lockfileVersion:', l.lockfileVersion\); const eb = l.packages['node_modules/esbuild']; console.log\('esbuild in lock:', eb ? eb.version : 'NOT FOUND'\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const vitest = l.packages['node_modules/vitest']; console.log\('vitest version:', vitest?.version\); const deps = vitest?.dependencies || {}; const peerDeps = vitest?.peerDependencies || {}; console.log\('vitest deps:', JSON.stringify\({...deps, ...peerDeps}, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const vite = l.packages['node_modules/vite']; console.log\('vite version:', vite?.version\); console.log\('vite deps:', JSON.stringify\(vite?.dependencies || {}, null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l.packages\).filter\(k => k.includes\('vite'\) || k.includes\('esbuild'\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const vite = l.packages['node_modules/vitest/node_modules/vite']; console.log\('nested vite version:', vite?.version\); const eb = vite?.dependencies || {}; console.log\('nested vite esbuild dep:', JSON.stringify\(eb, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const rolldown = l.packages['node_modules/rolldown']; console.log\('rolldown:', rolldown?.version\); const nested = l.packages['node_modules/vitest/node_modules/rolldown']; console.log\('nested rolldown:', nested?.version\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(list\(d['data'][0].keys\(\)\), indent=2\)\) if d.get\('data'\) else print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; projects=[p for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['projects'] if 'ilan' in p['name'].lower\(\)]; print\(json.dumps\(projects[0], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(start /b cmd /c "timeout /t 30 /nobreak > nul && docker logs crm-server --tail 5")
